g.text: No index: ~23 minutes on NVMe SSD
With index: ~30 seconds on NVMe SSD
Rule of thumb: index wins when < ~20% of inner rows match
O(n × m) random I/O → O(n × log m) seeks
WITH INDEX ON JOIN COLUMN — O(n × log m)
customers — FULL SCAN per outer row
idx_customers_id — B+tree SEEK per outer row
L3 leaf: 1 I/O — rowid + heap fetch
